summary: Develop internal policies from requirements gathering through drafting to stakeholder review.

inputs.name: policy_domain
inputs.description: The area of policy to develop (privacy, security, HR, etc.).

outputs.name: policy_draft
outputs.description: Draft policy document with proper structure and language.

outputs.name: implementation_guide
outputs.description: Guide for implementing the policy across the organization.

outputs.name: review_checklist
outputs.description: Checklist for stakeholder and compliance-owner review.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Keep issue spotting and human review explicit.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is policy development and not legal advice on policy enforcement.
Require policy domain and regulatory context.
Draft in plain language with compliance framework references.
End with stakeholder review checklist; do not claim policy is approved.

steps.action: Gather policy requirements from regulatory context and stakeholders.
Map applicable regulations to policy requirements.
Draft policy document following organizational standards.
Review draft for compliance framework alignment.
Compile policy package with implementation guide and review checklist.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read documents, policies, and reference materials.

verification.method: Check the output names the policy domain and regulatory context.
Check the policy follows standard structure with definitions, scope, and procedures.
Check output includes stakeholder review checklist.

success_criteria: Policy covers all required regulatory and stakeholder requirements.
Policy is written in plain language with proper structure.
Output ends with review checklist for stakeholder approval.

rollback.when: If scope, confidentiality, or review authority is unclear, revert the draft and regenerate a narrower output for counsel review.
